title: More Fun TNTs
description: Variations of useful TNT that are better at destroying your friend's home
body:
## Versions supported

At the moment Forge 1.19.2 and 1.20.1 are supported.

## Features

- Negative TNT - Breaks blocks and randomly places them elsewhere in the blast radius
- Shuffle TNT - Shuffles all the blocks in the blast radius
- Shuffle TNT 4x - Same thing as Shuffle TNT but the blast radius is 4x larger
- Knockback TNT - Deals a great amount of knockback
- Water TNT - Creates a sphere of water
- Lava TNT - Creates a sphere of lava
- Snow TNT - Places snow layers on the surface of the blast radius. Stackable.
- Snow TNT 4x - Same thing as Snow TNT but the blast radius is 4x larger
- Cat TNT - Summons a few cats. Uncraftable.
- Dome TNT - Creates a glass sphere (usually has the shape of a dome when ignited on a surface)
- Fire TNT - Ignites the surface of the blast radius on fire.

## Crafting Recipes

All crafting recipes are shown in the Images section.
